name: Marbella

hero.alt: Marbella coastline at sunrise with La Concha mountain
hero.lead: Beach life, established neighbourhoods, international schools and year-round energy come together in one of southern Europe's most recognised residential markets.

seo.title: Marbella Area Guide & New Developments | Nueva Living
seo.description: Explore Marbella's lifestyle, property prices and selected new developments with Nueva Living's practical area guide.

intro.headlineHtml: A place that works beyond the summer
paragraphs: Marbella combines a relaxed Mediterranean setting with the services buyers need for longer stays or full-time living. The beach, restaurants, private healthcare and international schools are all part of everyday life here.
The area is varied. Marbella East feels greener and more residential, the Golden Mile is closer to the centre and Puerto Banus, while hillside neighbourhoods offer more privacy and open views.

highlights: Coast & Beach Clubs
A long coastline with family beaches, beach clubs and year-round seafront dining.
Dining & Daily Life
A broad restaurant scene, international services, private healthcare and established shopping.
Schools & Families
Several international schools and residential neighbourhoods suited to full-time family life.
Golf & Leisure
Easy access to courses across Marbella East, Nueva Andalucia and Benahavis.
International Access
Around 40 to 45 minutes from Malaga Airport, depending on the neighbourhood.
Property Choice
Apartments, penthouses and villas across beachside, town and elevated settings.
priceNote: Indicative asking-price average for resale homes in June 2026. New developments and prime micro-locations can sit above the municipal average.
formMessage: I would like to receive current new-development options, prices and availability in Marbella.

name: Estepona

hero.alt: Estepona old town street with white houses and flower pots
hero.lead: A lively old town, an improved seafront and a growing choice of new homes make Estepona one of the coast's most practical lifestyle markets.

seo.title: Estepona Area Guide & New Developments | Nueva Living
seo.description: Explore Estepona's lifestyle, property prices and selected new developments with Nueva Living's practical area guide.

paragraphs: Estepona has kept much of its Andalusian character while investing heavily in public spaces, the promenade and everyday services. It feels active throughout the year without the intensity of central Marbella.
Buyers can choose between the walkable town centre, beachside communities and the New Golden Mile, where many recent developments sit between Estepona and Marbella.

highlights: Old Town
Pedestrian streets, local restaurants, flower-lined squares and a genuine year-round atmosphere.
Beaches & Promenade
A long seafront, family beaches and improving pedestrian links along the coast.
New Golden Mile
A strong corridor for new apartments and townhouses between Estepona and Marbella.
Golf
A wide choice of courses around Estepona, Atalaya and the neighbouring Benahavis hills.
Everyday Services
Schools, healthcare, shops and sports facilities support both holidays and permanent living.
Easy Connections
Direct road access towards Marbella, Gibraltar and Malaga Airport.
priceNote: Indicative asking-price average for resale homes in June 2026. Beachside and newly built homes may be priced above the local average.
formMessage: I would like to receive current new-development options, prices and availability in Estepona and the New Golden Mile.

name: Benahavís

hero.alt: Benahavis mountain village and elevated hillside landscape
hero.lead: Gated communities, golf, open views and a quieter hillside setting make Benahavis a natural fit for buyers who value space and privacy.

seo.title: Benahavis Area Guide & New Developments | Nueva Living
seo.description: Explore Benahavis lifestyle, property prices and selected villas and new developments with Nueva Living.

intro.headlineHtml: A quieter setting, still close to Marbella
paragraphs: Benahavis stretches from its mountain village down towards some of the coast's best-known gated communities. It is less about walkable urban life and more about views, security, golf and a sense of separation.
The right location matters here. La Quinta, Los Arqueros, El Paraiso and the more secluded estates each offer a different balance of access, elevation and privacy.

highlights: Privacy & Security
A concentration of gated residential communities and low-density villa settings.
Golf
Courses including La Quinta, Los Arqueros and Los Flamingos are central to the area's lifestyle.
Open Views
Elevated plots can offer mountain, valley, golf and Mediterranean views.
Village Dining
Benahavis village is known locally for its restaurants and traditional Andalusian character.
Space
Larger terraces, private pools and villa plots are more common than in denser coastal areas.
Marbella Access
Puerto Banus and Marbella remain within practical driving distance from the main communities.
priceNote: Indicative asking-price average for resale homes in June 2026. Values vary considerably between communities and prime villa estates.
formMessage: I would like to receive current new-development options, prices and availability in Benahavis.

name: Nueva Andalucía

hero.alt: Puerto Banus marina and La Concha near Nueva Andalucia
hero.lead: Golf, restaurants, services and Puerto Banus are all close, creating one of Marbella's most convenient areas for holidays and longer stays.

seo.title: Nueva Andalucia Area Guide & New Developments | Nueva Living
seo.description: Explore Nueva Andalucia and Golf Valley lifestyle, property prices and selected new developments with Nueva Living.

paragraphs: Nueva Andalucia sits just inland from Puerto Banus and is built around an established mix of golf courses, restaurants, schools and residential communities. It is especially popular with international buyers who want an easy base.
Some pockets are walkable to local services, while elevated parts of Golf Valley offer more privacy and views towards La Concha or the coast.

highlights: Golf Valley
Las Brisas, Aloha and Los Naranjos create one of the coast's strongest golf settings.
Puerto Banus
The marina, beach, shopping and dining are only a short drive from most neighbourhoods.
Restaurants & Services
A strong year-round mix of cafes, restaurants, gyms, supermarkets and healthcare.
International Community
An established full-time and second-home community with international schools nearby.
Lock-and-Leave
Many apartment and townhouse communities offer managed grounds, pools and practical security.
Rental Appeal
Location and year-round activity can support demand, subject to the property and licence position.
priceNote: Indicative asking-price average for resale homes in June 2026. Aloha, frontline golf and newly built homes can differ materially.
formMessage: I would like to receive current new-development options, prices and availability in Nueva Andalucia and Golf Valley.

name: Mijas & Fuengirola

hero.alt: Fuengirola seafront with palms and Mediterranean water
hero.lead: Established services, beaches and direct links towards Malaga give this part of the coast a practical, lively character with a broad range of homes.

seo.title: Mijas & Fuengirola Area Guide | Nueva Living
seo.description: Explore Mijas and Fuengirola lifestyle, property prices and new-development opportunities with Nueva Living.

intro.headlineHtml: More choice, easy access and daily convenience
paragraphs: Fuengirola offers a long seafront, an active town centre and direct rail connections to Malaga Airport. Mijas adds several distinct settings, from Mijas Pueblo to La Cala and newer hillside communities.
Together they offer a wider range of prices and property types than central Marbella, with strong everyday services and an established year-round population.

highlights: Transport
Fuengirola's rail connection gives direct access to Malaga Airport and the city.
Beaches
A long urban seafront in Fuengirola and a more relaxed coastal feel around La Cala de Mijas.
Everyday Life
Hospitals, schools, shopping and sports facilities support year-round living.
Mijas Pueblo
A traditional white village with mountain views and a different pace from the coast.
Golf
Several courses sit between Mijas Costa, La Cala and the inland hills.
Broader Choice
Apartments, townhouses and villas across urban, beachside and elevated locations.
priceNote: Indicative asking-price averages for resale homes in June 2026. Values vary between the town centres, La Cala, the seafront and hillside communities.
formMessage: I would like to receive current new-development options, prices and availability in Mijas and Fuengirola.
